title: Urban Living Conservation 2Ltr Jar with Lid and Handle Red
features: Large glass jars ideal for storing numerous foods and liquids such as biscuits, lentils, rice, drinks and much more. These glass jars are made from thick and heavy clear glass with a square checked embossed design. The opening of the jars have a wide neck with carry handle and easy screw on red lid. Once opening, inside the jar is a removable lid which can be used for pouring in and out liquid content.

This glass storage jar is available in 3 different capacities – 1 Litre (Height: 15cm & Diameter: 12cm), 2 Litre (Height: 20.5cm & Diameter: 14cm) and 3 Litre (Height: 23.5cm & Diameter: 15.5cm). Please Note – ONLY 1 GLASS JAR in your chosen size shall be sent out.

WIDE NECK WITH A CARRY HANDLE – The features of a wide neck with carry handle will make this jar a useful storage accessory to use at home or even when in the outdoors i.e. picnics. You will be able to safely store and carry content without a hassle. Due the jar having a wide neck, you will easily be able to get to the bottom of the jar and reach your favourite biscuits & cookies stored!

REMOVABLE EASY POURING LID - Now you can enjoy your favourite beverages without worrying about how you will take them. If it's summer party/bbq in the garden or picnic gathering in the outdoors; make your favourite drinks, pour them in the jar and carry them with you there! This jar has a easy pouring lid which will allow you to pour in and out drinks or other liquid content without having any spillages. Due to glass being non porous, all liquid content will be 100% safe.

MADE TO LAST, TOUGHENED GLASS! - High quality clear glass with a made to last polished finish is what will make these large glass jars extremely durable and long lasting. As glass is known to be robust and has a smooth high resistant surface, these jar will be resistant to chips, cracks and scratches. The glass is also non porous, hence these glasses are 100% hygienic and no form of bacteria or flavour will remain on the surface no matter how much they are used.
description: Urban Living, A recognized brand in the United States, is proud to offer its kitchen storage containers on Amazon France. These containers are designed to bring a touch of elegance and efficiency to your culinary space. They are a reflection of exceptional quality, unparalleled style and flawless reliability. Each box is made with the utmost care and attention to detail, ensuring exceptional durability and strength. The sleek and modern design of the Urban Living canisters fits perfectly with any kitchen style, adding a touch of elegance to your space.
